final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && python -c "
lines = open('tests/test_basic.py').readlines()
# Fix lines 239-244: wrap chain() in list()
# Line 239 (index 238): '    chain(' -> '    list(chain('
# Line 244 (index 243): '    ),' -> '    )),)'
open('tests/test_basic.py', 'w').writelines(lines[:239] + ['    list(chain(\n'] + lines[240:243] + ['    )),\n'] + lines[244:])
"

cd /work && python -c "
content = open('tests/test_basic.py').read()
old = '''    chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    ),'''
new = '''    list(chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    )),'''
content = content.replace(old, new)
open('tests/test_basic.py', 'w').write(content)
"
